latest_statement_text: Trump issues new threat to Iran's civilian infrastructure
summary: Most recent Trump statement on Iran threatens civilian infrastructure. This follows previous statements including 'good talks ongoing with Iran' (March 25) and 'good confidence of Iran deal'.

additional_statements.text: Trump says 'good talks ongoing with Iran'
